sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong hehpihna thupha’n, lungsim khauh zo thei hi;
Leitung a it mana, A Tapa hong pia

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hin tawntungna pha ngah ding hi;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Gamlakah gul kikhai, a noptuam mah bangin;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawh neite sihkik ding, thukhenna i thei
A thu bang zui kei leng, kisia takpi ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: A minthan mah bangin, leitung hong gum ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Thupha bel hong tun’ ve’n, hong umphasak tahen.
